summary: Iteration 47: Tested MOU PDF race condition bug fix and AdminSchoolCRM.jsx P0 refactor. All features verified: (1) Backend add-document endpoint exists and atomically appends documents via $push. (2) AdminSchoolCRM.jsx loads without compilation errors, wrapper functions delegate to utility files. (3) No Content-Type: multipart/form-data header in FormData uploads. (4) All 4 utility files exist. (5) Both logo exports from ollAssets.js verified. (6) send-mou-email endpoint exists. Backend: 9/9 tests pass. Frontend: School CRM renders correctly with no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: parentCircularGenerator.js does NOT import from ollAssets.js (has no OLL logo usage) - this is expected since it generates a DOCX with text header, not a PDF. Not a bug.
ollAssets.js correctly exports both OLL_LOGO_HORIZONTAL (line 4) and OLL_LOGO_B64 (line 9) via export const.
proposalPdfGenerator.js imports both logos; mouPdfGenerator.js imports only OLL_LOGO_B64 (correct, horizontal logo not needed in MOU header).
AdminSchoolCRM.jsx reduced to 10,707 lines (from ~12,077). Utility files total 1,161 lines extracted.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (School CRM loads, no compilation errors, no console errors)

seed_data_creation: Added 2 TEST_ documents to school 09dcd297-f09a-4f16-a8eb-e52747b8d46c via backend tests (TEST_Proposal and TEST_VerifyPersist type).
context_for_next_testing_agent: BugFix+Refactor iteration 47. Verified: (1) POST /api/schools/{school_id}/add-document atomically appends to documents array (uses $push operator). (2) POST /api/schools/{school_id}/send-mou-email exists and sends email via Resend with Cloudinary URL attachment. (3) AdminSchoolCRM.jsx imports generateProposalDocument, generateMOUDocument, generateParentCircularDocument from utils/ and wraps them in local thin functions. (4) All FormData uploads only set Authorization header (no manual Content-Type). (5) ollAssets.js exports OLL_LOGO_B64 (white logo for dark backgrounds) and OLL_LOGO_HORIZONTAL (for proposal light backgrounds). Test credentials: testadmin@oll.co / test123 (falls back to admin@oll.co / Dagaji03@). Test school ID: 09dcd297-f09a-4f16-a8eb-e52747b8d46c. GET school data endpoint: /api/orders/school-details/{school_id} (returns full school record including documents array).
